name: Culp for Congress
subject: The Left Loves Diminishing America's History
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=Bz5oW7&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9QsM1W&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/84567b8c-bff0-4cd1-8684-f9ffc05f3d63.png]

Independence Day is America's most important holiday and the left love to destroy it.

While I was at the Freedom Festival in Moses Lake, WA celebrating our nation's liberty with fellow patriotic Americans, President Biden was in Washington DC fighting his own war for independence...from COVID-19. Instead of taking this opportunity to unify our country around the exceptionalism of the United States and her founding, Clueless Joe spent most of his address rambling about an issue most of us have moved past.

The left love to diminish patriotism and scare you!

Aren't you tired of being told you should be afraid and ashamed? Americans are bold, fearless, brave, and not afraid to take risks but Biden, the media, and the radical left have sought to destroy that legacy. Americans have a right to be proud. Our land is flawed, no doubt, but what other nation has stood up and declared that freedom and one's rights are sacred? What nation has declared to the world that no person should violate the rights of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness? America is a beacon of freedom to the world, a place where people flock to pursue the "Great American Dream" and are able to fulfill that vision.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/b6376b45-83d1-40a0-a0c1-658c4df92f31.jpg]

Why did Biden focus on Covid and not our Constitutional Republic and its founding?

Because the left loves to try and fill Americans with fear and erase history. Biden thinks Americans, like you, will allow strangers to come into your neighborhood and into your yard and inquire about personal health decisions. What the radical left forgets is that Americans know our Constitution and nowhere in our founding documents does it say that the federal government can come to your door and push vaccines on you. Look up the castle rights.

Dan Newhouse is part of the problem.

When Dan Newhouse voted to unconstitutionally impeach President Trump, he sided with the radical left and the agendas that they have been pushing. He is part of the problem in our country and his voting record is proving it. I will be a constitutional civil servant and proudly represent the 4th District and stand for your freedom to choose.

Stand with me and for America

Loren

name: Doug Mastriano
subject: 2020 audit initiated in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO | DOUG MASTRIANO IS HONORABLY RETIRED
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908258:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)
---
Peter,
---
I have officially initiated the process for a forensic investigation of the Pennsylvania 2020 election.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908258:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)
---
[Source: Associated Press]
---
_I have already requested information from counties across Pennsylvania with a deadline to comply by July 31._
---
_As a citizen of the freest nation in the world, YOU have a RIGHT to know that our elections are honest and fair -- and I promise to fight to uncover the truth about the 2020 election for you._
---
[**Please make a contribution as we move forward with the forensic audit of the 2020 election in Pennsylvania.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908258:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908259:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908260:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908261:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908262:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908263:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908258:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)**
---
From last-minute rule changes that accommodated ballots received after 8 p.m. on election night 2020, to hundreds of sworn affidavits alleging fraud, _you have every reason to be suspicious about the 2020 elections in Pennsylvania._
---
All I'm asking for is a transparent and thorough investigation to prove to U.S. voters that our votes were fairly counted, and that we have nothing to worry about.
---
But according to Democrats, that's too much to ask. Everyone on the Left is attacking me for initiating this audit.
---
Even the _Associated Press_ called me an "ultra-conservative."
---
If fighting for the integrity of your vote makes me an "ultra-conservative," then so be it. But I prefer the term _American._
---
I trust you know that I will not stop fighting to deliver transparency and security to our elections. But at this critical moment, I'll need you to stand by my side.
---
[**So please, make a contribution as we move forward with the forensic audit of the 2020 election in Pennsylvania.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908258:6B-lDJlNo:m:1:3253819041:A56C762857BC7200A12AA8D7D89200CC:r)

As a citizen of the freest nation in the world, YOU have a RIGHT to know that our elections are honest and fair -- and I promise to fight to uncover the truth about the 2020 election for you. From last-minute rule changes that accommodated ballots received after 8 p.m. on election night 2020, to hundreds of sworn affidavits alleging fraud, you have every reason to be suspicious about the 2020 elections in Pennsylvania. name: Walt Blackman | AZ Conservative
subject: Kamala Harris can’t stop lying about the Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)
|
---
Hi Peter,

My name is Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 2nd Congressional District.

I was recently on _Newsmax_ calling out Kamala Harris for the open border anarchy unfolding at our southern borderー _[**Check it out now >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)

[**WATCH THE CLIP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)
Peter, I've been to the border, and I've seen this crisis with my own eyes, and let me tell you, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden have made this situation **a clear and present danger to our country!**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)
Being from Arizona, living near the border, I can tell you what's really happening down here:
-> U.S. Border Patrol is completely **_OVERWHELMED. _**
-> There are **_3,000_** **_ILLEGAL CROSSINGS_** per day.
-> We **_CAN 'T CONTROL_** who is coming into our country.

** ****_" Without borders, we don't have a country"_**_\- President Trump._

[**DEFEND AMERICA 'S BORDERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)
President Trump was exactly right. And that's exactly the kind of mess that Biden and Harris have created here in Arizona.

**That's why I'm running for Congress to defend America 's borders, just like I defended our country abroad. **

**__[Help send me to Congress to Defend America 's Borders by DONATING to my fight NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)__**

_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.
My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****_[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2491200/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)_**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
|
---
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908324:6PXqcJlXN:m:1:3253819041:1E2BF105061CA4AE46B552DC71BA894C:r)

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Some things are about more than politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | Friend,

Some things are about more than politics. When armed, violent extremists stormed the U.S. Capitol this January -- costing six people their lives and injuring hundreds more -- it was a threat to all of us, no matter who you voted for in the last election.

**That 's why I'm calling on Ron DeSantis to immediately launch a bipartisan investigation into the connections between Florida-based hate group members and the January 6th insurrection.** **[Will you join me by adding your name to our petition today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/XieDpeLTL_aEjicOmyqC7Q==/seou8ZNAEc1M7CYU-2powQ==)**

More Florida residents have been charged with crimes related to the insurrection than any other state. We need to know why this is and what we need to do to protect our state, our democracy, and law-abiding Floridians from the kind of violent extremism we saw on January 6th.

With the stroke of a pen, Ron DeSantis can take action to protect our communities, deliver justice against those who sought to harm our democracy, and show everyone that he takes the threat to our founding democratic principles seriously. | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/XieDpeLTL_aEjicOmyqC7Q==/seou8ZNAEc1M7CYU-2powQ==)
---
**[If you're as concerned as I am about the connections between Florida-based hate group members and the January 6th insurrection, please join me in calling on Ron DeSantis to form a bipartisan state commission to investigate the matter.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XieDpeLTL_aEjicOmyqC7Q==/seou8ZNAEc1M7CYU-2powQ==)**

Thank you,
Charlie

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/XieDpeLTL_aEjicOmyqC7Q==/olwHVN0kTV8zAvnImVwQ-A==?refcode=20210710_p_1_fl&amount=25)

Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. clean_body: Maya Angelou famously said, “when someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time.” | | | = | | Derek, Maya Angelou famously said, “when someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time.” In a new undercover video, Glenn Youngkin showed us exactly who he is. In the video, Youngkin told a young woman he won’t talk publicly about his extreme anti-abortion stance because he doesn’t want to scare independent voters. Derek, Youngkin’s admission should terrify women who care about making their own health care decisions and doing what’s best for their families. If Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he will ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. Virginia families are counting on us to stop that from happening. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With a conservative super-majority on the Supreme Court, it’s more important than ever for governors to be staunch defenders of the right to reproductive health care. Derek, that’s exactly who Terry McAuliffe will be. As Governor, Terry stood as a brick wall as extreme Republicans repeatedly tried to pass bills to restrict abortion rights and defund Planned Parenthood. With a conservative Supreme Court poised to strike down Roe v. Wade, the Governor is the last line of defense against attacks on abortion rights. We absolutely can't let Glenn Youngkin be that person. = Thanks in advance, Cecile Richards = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

subject: Welcome to the Washington Circle, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Joining this unlocked level means joining an elite group of conservative patriots

Peter, congratulations!

The Washington Circle - the premium tier of our 1776 Donor Club - was just unlocked and we picked YOU to join! This is an exclusive invite: _only 1,776 patriots were invited_ to the highest level of this exclusive conservative club.

We heard you're a conservative fighter... So what are you waiting for? **You only have until MIDNIGHT to accept this invitation. Otherwise, we'll be forced to move to the next patriot on our list.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908981:JKZWMJlNr:m:1:3253819041:9E4EA5E15DF851C7C776845C860FA22C:r)

We are sowing the seeds to create a network of patriots across the country who are interested in putting America first. As we get closer and closer to the Midterm elections in 2022, we need to know who's willing to join this fight to take back Washington with Republicans.

_Can we count on you to join us?_

[**JOIN THE WASHINGTON CIRCLE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57908981:JKZWMJlNr:m:1:3253819041:9E4EA5E15DF851C7C776845C860FA22C:r)

**Anything and everything you can do to stand with House Conservatives matters.** We don't have the same luxury as the Democrats do to ask mega millionaires for huge donations. Republicans rely on grassroots supporters like yourself - but that comes at a cost. It means that when people who get emails like this think other people will tow the line... _we fall seriously short. _

Joining the 1776 club at the platinum level means stepping up for Conservative patriots serving in the House and putting America First and laying the groundwork for winning **BIG** in 2022.

The Washington Circle - the premium tier of our 1776 Donor Club - was just unlocked and we picked YOU to join! You only have until MIDNIGHT to accept this invitation. Otherwise, we'll be forced to move to the next patriot on our list. We are sowing the seeds to create a network of patriots across the country who are interested in putting America first. As we get closer and closer to the Midterm elections in 2022, we need to know who's willing to join this fight to take back Washington with Republicans. Can we count on you to join us? | GET OUT AND VOTE! STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 ELECTION DAY - TUESDAY, JULY 13
The runoff for the State House District 34 special election in Cobb County is coming up! Make a plan to vote to keep Georgia - and Cobb County - RED.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-OyshuLkZmWT4iWLFUeB3NEw_Sr0k0g0FqaHFdP-NosH69KthzMyxTyw3lgKHbUSlIhUavKF4X3wBEhkdk1E5f1pbwVTvBRwH_ZrgBVWEF9PBB65rwzRu9Tl0wM-M3NOTVhd9aW323gW&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) to find your polling location.
We need your help coming down the home stretch, and we're recruiting volunteers to help us hold this seat.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-L8vehDws5lQVB7nM8UJCEUFEhVx8Baey8nZQfEwkLwHPJ_RMAOpR1t9URz--nOy6U0e7wgFv4xwZ1P9OJ_-Mz1yRE8es5J68Zt7ZdmkPt2rtteSPBC0xuk=&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) to volunteer in the HD34 special election.

| In the days ahead of the upcoming runoff for the State House District 34 Special Election, Greater Georgia [announced](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-PtWpLZwilrYsL-Cpun25l6oXXQNj2BAvImXJd7ZrW7kmZLTDVRddZKSH8xdiwX2M_pofGJS5x6D1_7pV7nKohZQQdhhDQWZESwAYXv1ULEVHvnL-KtOzm4Ja2TtEBgfP4Ikde-6SzGerEE7GC1Bzlxwqmj72bm0T9o18a3u-TkuasYuU0z3GlUw7O4SfvCUDWVCJGVJr4BdkM6AZqw-5FuoUbkZaVnlvec16u40GtTW&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) that, through [recent efforts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-PtWpLZwilrY_Tx8oX-A1rTUaLtJHmZeJbhJVjfWua2udKD8rkA1e0dhiHNto_Vx5_hvHVeWUrgnpukjCCWbZ0JXcFtH56JTIrLMyBnjiFkwy7u6BA2GYN19tRMLIW-sLLIt_PVMk5nK9M53hKFHxakuOF6oTKnzo69UF8Gatpkv&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==), it has registered thousands of new conservative voters and achieved important milestones. We have been engaging hundreds of thousands of voters, reaching out to diverse communities, holding elected officials accountable for restoring faith and integrity in our elections, and working to restore voter confidence.
Key metrics include:

* Registered thousands of new conservative voters
* Engaged over 170,000 registered but inactive conservative-leaning voters
* Reached over 700,000 Georgians to promote election integrity across the state
* Recruited over 150 volunteers to date for mobilization efforts, including to knock doors, make phone calls, write letters, and serve as poll watchers in upcoming elections
* Hosted six roundtables with community leaders from the African American, Hispanic American, Asian American and Pacific Islander, and Indian American communities
* Held eight events in six counties across the state to register new voters, recruit volunteers, and expand Greater Georgia's network to prepare for 2022
* Hosted nine training sessions with volunteers, many new to grassroots advocacy

In addition to building the foundation for a voter mobilization network, Greater Georgia has addressed concerns of Georgians by standing up for fair elections:

* [Launched](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-G6qj4G-uiiRevjmzUDkWoN1ZR0rtgeJOx-EziKaFY33qUIzX7JaENjc9EjWln3za6YF6ftjcC1oJuVcgOn3f7CCWKkfHLIkkBM-10PeHKVKzEjyMZOQwv2pW83BxDD2zSKlLf-a4rkjwJBPMyi9MJUpA723CNPDHj_hMFo7vm5XujJRHBCLsq5vb9RTFizJX51LQY9U1UvQGTVjmQQnziB8demc8gjLVigwAy_EYr8k0OBEtv9M78jzFZCrC5xCbEe0ryS6ZVX6&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) a mass-mobilization [effort](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-IWHI5kxKAu9YMZTlL2V3vUhy2kw1rW8VZ9aSjSd2pOircRDJcTFn7YPOifOeArffh5a3O8Ae_xJocaCcRm4lI98U4_WjYxhmb6ve85SKZ6YCS3XhmHl4KOhBs9HwhbOi9gpnEXOnQyELiMmMn08J1IKD4BpRKbnxtBAbg2HdCrL0yMzGLNs0kU3hUVsAGB_VRRyXxt76x0tTllHsH2NHrWf3prenG_kBNiKZvKvf3l9s5GICykefSxJCpd0QYm77w==&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) to [ensure](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-IWHI5kxKAu9AgqHAfeL8gY4WIQ9FUMoZo1qGM_CpRE2oQX9wY7yye-X7MnMYeViSi5m_lxJ6frIrbhttfpaLnFy4d7NMxzslgjt2cz0RZu25-HBqjZJUHiNA65zUNemPxp2DdP4RQ1jKDyIPCD3rr98rLC8c_2nKNLp0IUNiFwFFMfswI8mIkIY6PYaX14HvpEjtz0M9kGkxI3IXvt2v43SXcdPhGkJAU7Nvq9-5mv6JhgP2DlvSGa1BNqGpzigDQg7w9f2CxuA&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) awareness, registration, and mobilization for the special election for State House District 34 in Cobb County, outperforming the district's 2020 state house result by 3 percentage points
* [Strongly](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-GAkvh6jAZTQLCPKicwec8uwB5AukJK8k8N5RGbSau8Y5y4_IYlETM6lj-aOBVGoFTIfi35E9x-RyI__0SzjQdII2mMQmwyBoRf_-7h2_9ODB4tW-3ALWXAcX0EustP9QrjXDtQphcVcYM3bHBsNmRzJkp4yMXd-yNqTGdiZoU4ACsggTinhRF7bbOXKooC59__Q6PFG6C1wYb2YVTT2eGs=&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) [supported](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-E5TAf50f9srTLnnmDFmQb4RbLuUUK4y0uODtSxyzKVvLqx2SJfOlD2LkLHi-8jQ7Hu9P2DAAbIjLaU1SV7Boc5iMerWYIycPE1NDxxdoI1Ex5RcR7V7wnOpfyyRobxJS29Hn1JYiJJpnNvPt7enA8kxKJwISH8SVcGmWSTCUsDgVswf2EZfCyLWtAgXCS2TpQ==&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) the case to unseal and [inspect](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-GAkvh6jAZTQxm1iLMDVN1KQmHTaj4cPg4unjPn2ljk_OsqUd_TkEzq_DU2mo7VytM2hzvWWiGTWI6bNTJUiZmM6ssCFTPTRjRr3afFLweGsRRy2IAp2dhJfdKOAFoWgPwj7hjpDobSdKi9zg7RxWGuG_i6vAHhyzYd1vU0diH0VPAxoNNl9VJiiP67YqkhZThpW05hmt_ii&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) Fulton County absentee ballots from November 2020
* [Called for](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-CLyWabEcnLQYpR1u4XKuJKqg-Rv2bjoQBH_uhhB27fYBc1AmcwOV6cktMpVQcO2nkz4_pyUJLz7DamyTviTbJ7maXtIs_kKnMXeKCeV7UOkVM1LxX4WP-yG7tlGHxaanaSESL24oGucv2LaUMYx1Rq5mLmaAzzJf4s0dohlpBq4nDAolcqtiWdyikZfRL1FRg==&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) an [open](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-CLyWabEcnLQQaRk0BQJCMAFkPPLCCIWtX_KwP8euIBQqj1DoLSYhq6XIeBdpNu2mszaRV7R1xLiD16rFbw_1ldsecTrmaEOUByuD2JoamNcXKbbJYBklwl5Q_3MKtai8fvyVtAOz2zOLUKTMH5Dt6qsd_7qTDLIoz1EhBtuAcnfPJqNaotzGSqfx8ytbablXv-j5OE2F27RC1z9nwV7x6LTwFmqXmKxw5K7vEV3ITGHw9Dkg1-Xm9AOQJAacZRR-XOQo_izCPh7nXfIQ5rbqfoFijjCIwEOhW1hrhYYp9-lWiBmcUreU9BQAtYbMaOutTi1NYynABAszVdHSA91qNKfGTSukwHfsw==&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) [investigation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-CLyWabEcnLQchWcZAMHotZdzPoM1boBAvs8TQHMyJP7Lx9dQUzIQPOOc0uIokpgiQGJw8yFLpFzOES3izKGpH4SkbRqtsyp3VKFZ17ZybAAkG3rAIgOvkbHICEqJplHZfgONVwu86csGjElvLuTaeiwvA-t3PkSl-hp6GuDTLe5w-Mh0mQG_KM2sxJag90_gizHgCOx07G49h8yXo4d3jUm2s1zFbwvNRo0VN_XXBHZUVlVhwuDaac=&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) into Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's actions
* Filed an open records request with Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's office concerning the millions of dollars they received from CEIR, an organization founded by Mark Zuckerberg
* [Launched](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-G0m2LQ5JzJUiKwu8ZNZ-u6hTLkRGVKZd5g930mjjVivdMP4O8LlQEZFyBO1BhGsLI1r3RFXLN_qxP0W9gbBOdKCCO6wiSmCisJSVGKWEvAEIPqW-3yJzltAIkPNT1ypigzWHaWCy1Hn-9n9pzrk1VCOm7XC32OV_I2l8CTEJarlghfXBX-QolswhXzS6xgjOInkpSSr96k3nw24qybBJnYNgAE0a_9-1eMmeoBx6ULrv0fg379-2kn_uvyH7tLUbyMHdtxQSm2A&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) a digital ad campaign in [support](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-G0m2LQ5JzJU97GFO9wTN9oKMuRP75i7MraKw9yJ9kIHM1wv1axCSCZBu6QXuOxOt8sd4oSfuksb8z22SbZc2DtWAd2BJZjFiuoUK2eYL63gskY89wU9FGcLvhyibPH8tSHyPh2f6DNE8dg7jiurwQ9LPS0L71klUBl_ddJymNzeIs5R-EeC1Ehx5NRd89s8cG8pOrJccIzuOFW4GeqYG7U=&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) of the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) and [thanking](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-G0m2LQ5JzJUTFC8Xw8qr8TtHWBz4gSt4eP0JnIa1F_3JSxDjESe8Cwp-JaghaOBnl8WMf2xtbOTt_aWhZPmRgrYZBJ7LHlbcvte9AVAmGiIUqFkmDOMir7nJGwYcT37d12kPvQuJhzn-F97kst3ny3s79cp4SqsmuFGnqH6FpNA7TFMVLH05DeAJkbQyswOeJZl1N6FUHhB&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) the Georgia Legislature and Gov. Kemp for their efforts
* [Launched](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-CLyWabEcnLQPxBS965O-MgiW1M24GWsDTLkoCRQepuaZX715iVyC3u-mVNuzdnKCmRBt7MAsrQYLSznG0AP5gmXCmh2z5y7v7uEFvWLxOh0VPSwmztlLMRLuHVqQYNE1HDesXE4EumSo7ik-TBEFkKLl5GMfr0XoABOFSRREwqD&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) a billboard [campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-CLyWabEcnLQrTiCG2W4DMSLQVOgRZlwQ9iRawQCP_brHgEAyHJSi1istdPVDeV0oxILoyCkH7yzbE8SmygLVlDqhh6gfZn5la9tBJM7cOTHq4ezZjbZD1BsdPRzsUyhPWbUs3LpuPBYtH-NJmJJJ6sPPH4AUkAIhhKvaondifpb4hJzO103YIvmRprFlUjG0DY4hrVQ17ff9zOjCJC7LY0xq9_f7p5ByOXcPZQ4pJB9jZXtf2_92xJYK4xNOCtk5E_D-nPcOUbvRXcEkXWEl2E=&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) [slamming](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-CLyWabEcnLQAYFaOeqqFqM9U73vvS2Rlk_TIwTGxXQpEdqftwQz0kglZqtiRkmoLEwJOZaeiKWus_IO2Vf2emfPWIKxfWMNy7wqW010EaUc1RwFTN3zL9NgQWsfZKdCS2HaTdrs6CW5mqnynhSGqVqVIr1-ezOPmT88PBTspW7ozX6l0kybWb9L8n8Endp9Kzbo2U11_HZ8otMKaR0afn4RGtz6Z2SNOYXnAS0hRf4C&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) the MLB's decision to relocate the All Star game from Georgia based on lies about Georgia's voting law from Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and Raphael Warnock

| Greater Georgia is hosting many more events to keep people involved and active in the fight for a brighter future. Our Field Team is hosting a collaborative Volunteer Training Session in partnership with the Pike, Lamar, Upson, Meriwether, and Spalding County Republican Parties, where we will show you how you can help us bring unregistered voters into the fold and defend conservative values.
Dinner will be provided and will feature Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler.
The session will be Monday, July 26, at 6 p.m. at the Fellowship Baptist Church, 1165 Hannah's Mill Road, Thomaston, GA 30286\. To attend, please RSVP by registering on our [Eventbrite page](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-NYVO3IZsfqRLhjUg-GU8z0tBxpASe16WuDCgxXy7HPPOMtZAMk19KLQmVp-5UCmxuCsW1OlY4YRxgNHvWd3NBP-wK3Y9QvIDq03GigRcNYVBoPxaX7SN6WGKSyDJhtB29UBMlLBB8C569W-eNdYLhnBwazvSrMHlpn4wuftEh65_YGpCAVvDfTNRV-fK5qdt_XO1ktvH-pbilhgtJKY4nM=&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==) by Monday, July 19 at 12 p.m.

| Kelly Loeffler touts her organization's work in Kennesaw Statehouse race July 8, 2021 - [Marietta Daily Journal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y452bowJtyRL-EzH9opHP9s8zQbC6L7irbDGijHnQy5FctorNs4v-EVE3TXd1s_6AOZwcyuZSjO_0fEmUoBSSOP_USuCNJCWIilT1r51bFXaIwwkWxmg7pP3ju5bmj_lwQS4VdgmRp-LnKho_WhboYOiuquxmev5dTKt2BenZu0eoMhIcArgAU8uo1r_6AqXbLDJWxHr1VcFBwZyph2SGX0nuTj6wnSplAfSV-0WzFBFuVwe-qQBLa5tWBNd2G3xSpyNst0luu1Wo_yjdalH1V3XlWlwCt14Qquq_QiAFXielc2sbelAFqYLfvlH_Wq9&c=73F2Sf_eoAsJYoRYn9MzlRtzvEnZdK16leSTsfIt8kbC4KHiuo_4DA==&ch=Y1aWNlcqv8RlOVTq3bk9rOe7soxQt5zUS10NPHiCFuHwDtMFFogevw==)
"Loeffler has not shied away from comparisons between her group and Abrams'. Allowing Fair Fight has been 'very effective,' the former senator said this week she wants to break its 'monopoly on voter mobilization.'
To those ends, Greater Georgia has now spent over $100,000 on the [State House District 34] special election, a spokesperson for the organization said...
Loeffler told the MDJ her organization has mailed over 1,500 postcards, knocked over 3,000 doors, and identified about 1,600 unregistered conservative voters in House District 34, which covers parts of Marietta and Kennesaw. She couldn't say how many of those 1,600 voters Greater Georgia had reached, or registered, but said the group has registered 'thousands' of new Republicans around the state."

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | GET OUT AND VOTE! STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 ELECTION DAY - TUESDAY, JULY 13 The runoff for the State House District 34 special election in Cobb County is coming up! Make a plan to vote to keep Georgia - and Cobb County - RED. Click == to find your polling location. We need your help coming down the home stretch, and we're recruiting volunteers to help us hold this seat. Click == to volunteer in the HD34 special election. | | | | In the days ahead of the upcoming runoff for the State House District 34 Special Election, Greater Georgia == that, through ==, it has registered thousands of new conservative voters and achieved important milestones. We have been engaging hundreds of thousands of voters, reaching out to diverse communities, holding elected officials accountable for restoring faith and integrity in our elections, and working to restore voter confidence. Key metrics include: Registered thousands of new conservative voters Engaged over 170,000 registered but inactive conservative-leaning voters Reached over 700,000 Georgians to promote election integrity across the state Recruited over 150 volunteers to date for mobilization efforts, including to knock doors, make phone calls, write letters, and serve as poll watchers in upcoming elections Hosted six roundtables with community leaders from the African American, Hispanic American, Asian American and Pacific Islander, and Indian American communities Held eight events in six counties across the state to register new voters, recruit volunteers, and expand Greater Georgia's network to prepare for 2022 Hosted nine training sessions with volunteers, many new to grassroots advocacy In addition to building the foundation for a voter mobilization network, Greater Georgia has addressed concerns of Georgians by standing up for fair elections: == a mass-mobilization == to == awareness, registration, and mobilization for the special election for State House District 34 in Cobb County, outperforming the district's 2020 state house result by 3 percentage points == == the case to unseal and == Fulton County absentee ballots from November 2020 == an == == into Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's actions Filed an open records request with Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger's office concerning the millions of dollars they received from CEIR, an organization founded by Mark Zuckerberg == a digital ad campaign in == of the Election Integrity Act (S.B. 202) and == the Georgia Legislature and Gov. Kemp for their efforts * == a billboard == == the MLB's decision to relocate the All Star game from Georgia based on lies about Georgia's voting law from Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, and Raphael Warnock | | | | Greater Georgia is hosting many more events to keep people involved and active in the fight for a brighter future. Our Field Team is hosting a collaborative Volunteer Training Session in partnership with the Pike, Lamar, Upson, Meriwether, and Spalding County Republican Parties, where we will show you how you can help us bring unregistered voters into the fold and defend conservative values. Dinner will be provided and will feature Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. The session will be Monday, July 26, at 6 p.m. at the Fellowship Baptist Church, 1165 Hannah's Mill Road, Thomaston, GA 30286\. To attend, please RSVP by registering on our == by Monday, July 19 at 12 p.m. Click == to RSVP and to learn more. | | | | UPDATES: | CHEROKEE COUNTY VOLUNTEER TRAINING Greater Georgia hosted a volunteer training session in Cherokee County June 29, 2021 | == | == | == | == | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Kelly Loeffler touts her organization's work in Kennesaw Statehouse race July 8, 2021 - == "Loeffler has not shied away from comparisons between her group and Abrams'. Allowing Fair Fight has been 'very effective,' the former senator said this week she wants to break its 'monopoly on voter mobilization.' To those ends, Greater Georgia has now spent over $100,000 on the [State House District 34] special election, a spokesperson for the organization said... Loeffler told the MDJ her organization has mailed over 1,500 postcards, knocked over 3,000 doors, and identified about 1,600 unregistered conservative voters in House District 34, which covers parts of Marietta and Kennesaw. She couldn't say how many of those 1,600 voters Greater Georgia had reached, or registered, but said the group has registered 'thousands' of new Republicans around the state." Click == to read the full article. | | | | Justice Department sues Georgia over new voting law June 25, 2021 - == "... former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler, who started the Greater Georgia organization to promote conservative electoral policies, said Biden's administration was in for a tough fight. 'We will deploy every necessary resource to help defend this legislation from liberal overreach in Washington,' she said." body:
We're still 53 supporters short. Help us fix that before midnight!

President Trump is just one day away from taking the stage in Dallas for the annual Conservative Political Action Conference, and we need your help!

We are gathering a list of top patriots across the nation that still stand with Trump and want to help him bring back a Conservative Majority in Congress. _**There 's only one problem.**_ We're **53** supporters short in your zip code only. Every other area has already hit its goal!

**TOP PATRIOTS NEEDED******
---
**Patriots Needed in Your Area: 53

Supporter Status: MISSING

_Time Left to Show my Support:_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57909033:Jb_unJlN-:m:1:3253819041:E6C8F872184D5E6F5F3CC5A2C4F82FBF:r)**
[**STAND WITH TRUMP & HOUSE GOP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57909033:Jb_unJlN-:m:1:3253819041:E6C8F872184D5E6F5F3CC5A2C4F82FBF:r)

After endless fabricated and unjust attacks against President Trump, we must show him and House Leadership that he still has a country full of supporters that have his back. The Left will stop at nothing to destroy his legacy and overturn each and every accomplishment he's had, **but we won 't let history be rewritten. **

[**Will you stand with Trump and House Conservatives before his speech tomorrow?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57909033:Jb_unJlN-:m:1:3253819041:E6C8F872184D5E6F5F3CC5A2C4F82FBF:r) With the support from patriots like you, we can prove the Democrats wrong and fight to keep Trump's America First legacy alive.

[**STAND WITH TRUMP & HOUSE GOP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57909033:Jb_unJlN-:m:1:3253819041:E6C8F872184D5E6F5F3CC5A2C4F82FBF:r)

Don't let President Trump and House Leadership down. [**Step up before 11:59 PM tonight and help show Trump that area hasn 't turned its back on him.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57909033:Jb_unJlN-:m:1:3253819041:E6C8F872184D5E6F5F3CC5A2C4F82FBF:r)

Thank you,

House Conservatives

We are in the midst of Joe Biden's Summer of VIOLENCE! | | | == | It isn't an exaggeration - mob violence, homicides, and even attacks against law enforcement officers have all skyrocketed thanks to lawless Democrat leadership. Maybe Biden thought you would forget about his son's scandals, the anti-White Critical Race Theory being peddled at multiple levels in his administration, and all the ways he's putting America Last if he turned your city into a crime-ridden, third-world dystopia... We don't have to stand for it. name: John Fetterman
subject: Fwd: STOP FETTERMAN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I've always been the kind of guy who will do what I believe is right — no matter the political cost.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210710-1952-header&t=1&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)
Peter,
I've always been the kind of guy who will do what I believe is right. No matter the political cost.
My stances on my core issues haven't had to "evolve," and my sense of right and wrong isn't determined by the way it polls.
**So, I wasn't *exactly* surprised when the PA GOP recently blasted out this flaming hot partisan garbage to their email list of supporters:**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22024?refcode=em20210710-1952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6) "Fetterman has consistently abused his power as Lieutenant Governor to grant clemency to inmates who are serving life sentences... We can't let him bring this lawlessness to the Senate."
---
Peter, I will NEVER let fear of far-right criticism from the GOP stand in the way of doing what's right for the working people of our country. And I won't ever back down from my commitment to fighting for second chances. I will always proudly stand on the side of second chances, freedom, and justice for those serving wrongful or excessive convictions.
**Our Republican opponents may try to smear me + my record, but I'm just going to keep doing what's right.** If that kind of attitude is something you agree we need more of in the halls of the U.S. Senate, then I'm asking you for a personal favor on behalf of our entire campaign today:
[**_Will you send $5 our way for the very first time right now? Our grassroots campaign is only as strong as we make it, and it's clear that the GOP is already building it's war chest to try to stop us._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22024?refcode=em20210710-1952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22024?refcode=em20210710-1952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)**
To be perfectly honest with you, Peter, it doesn't come as a big surprise that the PA GOP is trying to weaponize my record on clemency against me. **I would put my political career on the line in an instant in pursuit of what is right and just.**
To me, it's beyond worth it to change a life or to reunite a family torn apart by our merciless criminal justice system.
One of the accomplishments I'm most proud of is that, in my first 2.5 years as Chair of the PA Board of Pardons, we have successfully cut down the clemency application process time by streamlining the process and making it more accessible to Pennsylvanians. This has allowed us to process more pardons and recommend more commutations to the Governor than in the previous 25 years combined.
That is the kind of work that I believe is worth doing.
[**_Peter, if you're with me in this fight for second chances, compassionate public policy, and lifting up working families all across this nation, then please support our grassroots campaign by contributing any amount you can. Whether it's $5 or more than that, every donation makes a difference._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22024?refcode=em20210710-1952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. The GOP is spewing this nonsense about us because they're afraid of the strong, honest, and inclusive campaign we are building together. They see our campaign as their biggest threat on the Democratic side, and we have to answer this attack with an immediate surge of support. [** _Will you send $5 our way today to own a piece of this grassroots campaign to flip this Senate seat blue in 2022?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22024?refcode=em20210710-1952&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210710-1952-footer&t=25&refcode2=1952_434096_q7bTS6&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1952%2E434096%2Eq7bTS6)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Knock Knock...Guess Who's Coming to Dinner...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=Bz5X81&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EzTrhVW&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/ccf8345e-f1db-4762-87f5-5695946cc7e5.png]

"The nine most terrifying words in the English language are: I'm from the government and I'm here to help.” - Ronald Reagan

Joe Biden and his administration have now decided to send groups of "volunteers" to your door and ask whether you have taken the COVID-19 vaccination or not and then stand there and pressure you to get vaccinated. As an American, it is your choice to get vaccinated, and no one else's. You have a right for your medical information to remain private and between you and your doctor.

Who are these volunteers anyway?

We don't know. Biden through his press secretary Circle Back Psaki didn't explain that part of their plan. My question is, do you want strangers in your yard, speaking to your children, and essentially trespassing onto your property to violate your medical privacy? I know your answer because it's mine as well.

"Hell no!"

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/23e19bb4-0bcf-490a-b757-dd2160f2e61f.jpg]

Does the Biden Administration have a list of those who are vaccinated and those who aren't?

There's no way to know. Could this be their way of creating that list by going door to door in YOUR neighborhood and documenting responses? I wouldn't put it past them. They're showing that they're willing to stop at nothing to strip you, the American people, of your Constitutional Rights.

I will stand up for America, and I know you will stand with me because together we stand for the constitution of the United States of America.

Now is the time for hard work and for you, the everyday American to take a stand against the radical left. Dan Newhouse is a weak leader who shakes hands with the Democrats and cuts deals with them to allow these types of infringements into your God-given rights. I will follow our country's constitution, and I will stand up and defend America's freedoms, defend your freedoms.

Can I count on you? [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SWFyw0&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVDeZG&]

Loren

Only **a true Democrat** with the support of the voters and a national grassroots movement can beat a candidate like J.D. Vance \-- a GOP-sycophant who has the support of Trump's army of QAnon-loving, insurrectionist, far-right extremists.

Now here's something you may not know:

Many Texas Democrats -- myself included -- have been forced to announce campaigns for Congress without an exact sense of what our district boundaries will look like or who our voters will be. It's a disadvantage, and it's being done to us by design. They're not even trying to hide it.

The odds are against us, but giving up in Texas is simply not an option. Too much is at stake, and we are on the cusp of a major shift in our state.

**Early resources are going to be critical in defeating the voter suppression machine. Your grassroots support right now means being able to organize early, and build a strong foundation to turn out Democrats when it matters.**

That's why I need to ask:

**[We're coming up $9,101 short of our end-of-week goal to fight voter suppression and flip Texas blue. Will you rush in $3 or more right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32189518/294985782/77586780?refcode=em-07102021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY2N2NlNS1hNWUxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iM92dLCpYC4ElVJhlWuctoIBTMS9-IIxLx6MLnkxqR4=)**

Thanks in advance for your support,

Donna

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VZQV6izd-N0Wzp6GEUWHB4tUVppKAtaXm5y14KKfFwveAbwWwc7wFwcdOoOUwFjkF7plA6mGrkuC-vsQxsM-AEEoJP0Dapni0bOpT63bf6lgQoPB1v4JKTEC690cS-eKNLOjLHCKm9s-tgZSxnpapUTr40GUo72aL7MesU4Yz6I7l3iFMmDRvfqRFhNmM8i1&c=Fqw91SQdwV9qxybomWiUAeCHsEg8hVKFVKjdbWsh9wnauMttkcy6tA==&ch=5q7itR8_VJChMrFO88VvwTFGu4Cy_z5IgnED97xsHDjf8PyC3h7Nhw==)

| Peter,
America Last Democrats have weaponized their House majority to pursue a far-left agenda, to surround our nation's Capitol Building in barbed wire for political theater, and to target Trump supporters by calling them "extremists."
So just think about how great it will feel when, after we take back the House and send Pelosi back to the filth of San Francisco, we make our next Speaker of the House Donald J. Trump!
I pledge to you that this America First champion will have my vote once we defeat the far-left next cycle - [is Trump as Speaker an idea you can get behind?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VZQV6izd-N0Wzp6GEUWHB4tUVppKAtaXm5y14KKfFwveAbwWwc7wFwcdOoOUwFjkF7plA6mGrkuC-vsQxsM-AEEoJP0Dapni0bOpT63bf6lgQoPB1v4JKTEC690cS-eKNLOjLHCKm9s-tgZSxnpapUTr40GUo72aL7MesU4Yz6I7l3iFMmDRvfqRFhNmM8i1&c=Fqw91SQdwV9qxybomWiUAeCHsEg8hVKFVKjdbWsh9wnauMttkcy6tA==&ch=5q7itR8_VJChMrFO88VvwTFGu4Cy_z5IgnED97xsHDjf8PyC3h7Nhw==)

name: James Hartnett
subject: Fwd: essential supplies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I wanted to quickly bump this email up in case you missed it. I'm putting in an order on Monday for some new supplies so we were hoping you could help us out. Can you rush in a donation of $5 to help fund our next order? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email]
Stewart really appreciates your support. Without you we can't keep this campaign running at a high level.
Thanks,
James
Finance Director
---- Forwarded Message ----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email]Hi Peter,
Over the summer, our team will be getting out into the community to expand our reach in the district. In order to do that, we need your help getting them supplies.
We need everything from clipboards, chairs, and hand sanitizer to fans and masks. These supplies aren’t cheap. We announced early to build a strong foundation for a winning campaign.
Can you help us organize in the district over the summer by chipping in what you’d like to help pay for office supplies? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email]
🖊️ Chip in $5 for pens → 🖊️ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email&amount=5] 📋 Chip in $15 for clipboards → 📋 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email&amount=15] 😷 Chip in $50 for PPE →😷 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email&amount=50] ⛽ Chip in $100 for gas →⛽ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email&amount=100] 🏢 Chip in $250 for an office →🏢 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email&amount=250]I appreciate anything you're able to give to help us out!
Thank you,
James
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.
CONTRIBUTE >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email] CONTRIBUTE $25 MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2107-q3-sn-supplies?refcode=210710-email&amount=25&recurring=true]
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: Michael Whatley
subject: re: election integrity efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
I wanted to update you on our efforts, Peter.

| Peter, Lately, you hear a lot of people talking about election integrity \-- and rightly so. There’s nothing more important than ensuring that it’s easy to vote, hard to cheat, and clear who won. But here in North Carolina, Republicans have done a lot more than talking. _We’re taking action_ and getting results. _The fight is ongoing, and we at risk of falling behind. We need Grassroots Republican support if we’re going to keep winning._ **[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT to join the fight and help State Republicans fight for election integrity in the nation’s most critical battleground state. Everything depends on clean_body: I wanted to update you on our efforts, Peter. | Peter, Lately, you hear a lot of people talking about election integrity \-- and rightly so. There’s nothing more important than ensuring that it’s easy to vote, hard to cheat, and clear who won. But here in North Carolina, Republicans have done a lot more than talking. We’re taking action and getting results. The fight is ongoing, and we at risk of falling behind. We need Grassroots Republican support if we’re going to keep winning. | | | | | | Last month, we won a crucial victory -- blocking Democrat-led attempts to limit poll observers and undercut confidence in elections. I’m proud of that victory, but I know the Democrats will soon be back. We MUST remain vigiliant, Peter. | Thank you for whatever you can do. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Hey there -- just wanted to bump my email from yesterday. July is historically a slow month for online fundraising, but we weren’t expecting it to be _this_ slow. If we don’t reach our $20,000 goal this weekend, it could throw us off for the rest of the year. We could really use your help to get back on track. With our razor-thin majority in the Senate, we mean it when we say that every contribution makes a difference. **[Please rush $5 or whatever you can to keep New Hampshire blue and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32191944/294992895/1018596853?refcode=e20210710&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODU5OGUyZi1hZmUxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKhM1FrMVBz0dCXsEmX4ca8YoZble7GbcAoRvQePOe4=)** Thank you,

It’s not hyperbole to say that missing one deadline could cost us this race. We’ve developed a strategic roadmap to reelect the Senator (and hold Democrats’ slim Senate majority) and I’ll be blunt: The Senator only won her last race by 1,017 votes and Mike Pence and Mitch McConnell are chomping at the bit to retake New Hampshire. It’s not hyperbole to say that missing one deadline could cost us this race. Unfortunately July is off to a slow start and we’ve got a $20,000 hole to fill this weekend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Great to meet you, and thank you so much for your help. Aaron | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

It’s becoming more and more difficult to deliver clean drinking water to the 500,000 Iowans in and around Des Moines, as toxic fertilizer runoff overwhelms our water sources.
**It doesn’t have to be this way. With the right leadership, we can help farmers across Iowa invest in sustainable, resilient agriculture practices that will reduce air and water pollution.**
We can not only generate greater access to clean water for all Iowans, but empower farmers to become part of the solution when it comes to climate change.
**[Ras is ready to get bold about the basics and help guide Iowa into a cleaner, safer future. Add your name to join him in supporting investment in sustainable agriculture to ensure every Iowan has clean air and water>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32192176/294993810/191309457?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210710environment_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWM5NGZiOS1iMGUxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ID2yg_0Crn08Jq2u1kbYRoaoIzyGHleJqnVo5UziI5g=&emci=40c94fb9-b0e1-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=41c94fb9-b0e1-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: They sneak around under cover of darkness
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The audit is bringing sunlight |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=93f854d0ba&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

We all know that the Democrats love operating in the dead of night.

**That’s how no one can see their dirty deeds.**

_And that is exactly what we are seeing happen AGAIN!_

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Original “Election Integrity” Conservative leading the charge against Election Fraud in Arizona via _America’s Audit._

**We have found evidence of untold fraud in the 2020 election, and we are just beginning.**

There are three steps to our plan:
1. Finish America’s Audit in Arizona.
2. Spread America’s Audit to other states, including Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Georgia.
3. Ensure that future elections are protected!

**And the last part is key! None of this matters if the Democrats can do it again!**

_This is why I am writing you today._

We are making strong fundraising strides, but it is nothing compared to the Socialist Billionaire dollars that back our opponents.

**We are spearheading a tremendous grassroots movement that will defeat the Radical Left. But when it is grassroots versus the Swamp, Crony Billionaires, and Big Tech, we need big dollars.**

**_There is no other way. My campaign has been grassroots from the beginning, and it will ALWAYS be that way!_**

But for us to stay the huge grassroots movement that we have become, that means every donation, great, and small, will help us.

**It also means that we need the help to sustain the momentum, so we can FINISH America’s Audit, we can AUDIT the other states, and we can protect America’s elections from the DEMOCRATS!**

[Will you help me?

_Donate as much as you can to defend America’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1ae1ca3d4d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2cda6b776d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **After finding many discrepancies and issues with the 2020 election in Maricopa County, and use of a THIRD PARTY professional auditor, using read-only software, the Radical Left says they won’t use the Dominion machines anymore.**

Hmm...

Let me ask you a question. Which do you think is more likely?

That they are actually removing Dominion software because it could have been tampered in a third-party read-only audit?

**Or that the Democrats are using this as an excuse to remove fraudulent software and blame the Republicans all in one go?**

Wait a minute, you don’t need to answer that question – it’s plain as day.

**Right now, as a result of the Maricopa Election Audit,_America’s_ _Audit_ , they are scrambling to cover their tracks.**

_If this really was the issues, why couldn’t they have given up the passwords so auditors can examine the machines?_

**This doesn’t make any sense if you take them at face value.**

**_But when you realize the massive fraud Secretary of State Hobbs and the Democrat Swamp are covering up, well... it begins to make a lot more sense._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d3a70f479d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_This is classic Democrat propaganda._**

After abusing an entirely fraudulent system with terrible machines, they say they are going to get rid of them, and blame the Republicans while they are doing that!

**I have been fighting against this Democrat propaganda from day 1, and I know how the game is played!**
1. **Republicans investigate**
2. **Democrats cover their rears.**
3. **Democrats blame Republicans.**

How long do they think Republicans will stay silent on this?

**It is up to this grassroots movement and Conservatives like you to say NO to the Democrats and refuse to buy into their B.S.**

[Will you help me?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=132500c6ea&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Donate TODAY to stop the Radical Left from stealing our elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=acc88d5ec0&e=44b8c466b0)_

**While others remained silent after November 3rd, I stood up to be the vote of the voters. There would not have been a full-day Public Hearing on Election Integrity if I had not stood up to the establishment leaders in Arizona.**

_The establishment wanted to bury the fraud, incompetence, and mismanagement of the 2020 Presidential election in Arizona, but I said NOT ON MY WATCH! I was denied the use of the House of Representative hearing rooms, but we found another venue._

**This was so important that I fronted the cost myself. I am glad that a select group of legislators had the courage to join me and pursue the truth knowing they would face ridicule and harassment. We listened to our constituents when others blew them off.**

**_So do you want a Secretary of State that listens to constituents, gives them a voice in the process, and takes action or one who was part of the problem?_**

You have seen the attacks against me and you have seen what I have done.

**If I can do all of this as a representative in the Arizona House,[imagine what I could do as Secretary of State](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=85f3c6fcf2&e=44b8c466b0)?**

_My heart is on the table. I have bled for Election Integrity, and I will continue the fight no matter what!_

For our children, for our grandchildren.

**To all the Democrats who want to steal our Freedoms away from us, I have one thing to say.**

**_Not on my watch._**

[_Donate today to help support our campaign!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8b1c1ab341&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cea20aa389&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ececfd3997&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=5d76bb93f8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=5d76bb93f8).
---

name: Team Braun
subject: This is insane.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
This is not an accident.

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=772a2652aa474c978a5deb7b7621fe0b&_e=TpAFMOr2CPavNggvbJxrhn1AZS3sJDI4arWFWc94id5k8o7xywYAryyEmdojUwZo5TxsOlq7l2dNmi0kICQaD1SLIsHPskHS1KV67cUJkGN67cQxxHivZfIrLmbIHxZGMlXDleDwg8vImDZXEPTP2xQnokw4bxW5s8oT7g0KBF5uWgDusGE-FpCIY0zyHwSFBwEXNLkXQtrca8KHylM_71yUA45jvCnTOtzDzRyUleIvA51DJHDnV7DT5bkGJB_QN2sbAVXbPsB5Xw5DjRMC_T-c-FxEjPmseVLItOHOk__uagiBArP5oIsH6l_T07IDHxxuUUl3EJyjpbNNPb5v1JHiTVSXDwrX7IT2-YRfsquhyBoBxYZ9AWVBR7bkctH_tIN2G5xL-9CwJxg6GihRdil8ibK13bb6o469wk9tWTySMieuF0b_oZbgjIT68hTt59PlQG-byne63_GgLWBGMQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

It’s no surprise that Joe Biden broke his promise to _never raise taxes on the middle class._ Big changes are occurring everywhere, and inflation keeps getting _**worse.**_

Biden’s irresponsible spending binge is affecting daily life for everyone... it’s impossible not to notice:

• Fresh produce prices: **_UP_**
• Beef, poultry, seafood prices: **_UP_**
• Household product prices: **_UP_**
• Lumber prices: **_UP_**
• Gas prices: **_SKYROCKETING_**

**_This is simply not an accident._**

clean_body: President Trump is serious about securing our border, Peter. | Peter, In our nation’s history, there has never been a Border Security Disaster like what is currently taking place along our Southern Border. People are flooding into this country like you wouldn’t believe. All Joe Biden had to do was maintain President Trump’s America First Immigration Plan and Finish The Wall. But he didn’t. He opened the border and put our nation at risk. That’s why he recently announced his Trump Wall Defense Task Force -- a select group of Grassroots Republicans fighting to Stop The Left and SAVE AMERICA. | | | | | | The fact is that we have no idea who is coming into this country, Peter. And that’s entirely unacceptable. A nation without borders is no nation at all. That’s why we need PRESIDENT TRUMP’S TOP SUPPORTERS to step up and fight back against Joe Biden’s Border Crisis. Is that you, Peter? | Thank you. Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

Fellow Conservative,

On President Biden’s first day in office, he revoked a permit for the Keystone XL Pipeline. KILLING thousands of good-paying jobs.

Now, the company behind Keystone XL is suing the United States for **$15 BILLION** in damages - **which taxpayers like you and I will be responsible for.**

Joe Biden canceled the Keystone XL pipeline to pursue his far-Left anti-energy agenda and Americans are feeling the detrimental effects. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 2 must see headlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, climate change is here and now — you don’t need to look any further than my own community:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=1&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=2&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)
Heatwaves, droughts, and wildfires in the West, heavy rain and flooding in the Midwest, record cold temperatures, and more frequent hurricanes in the South and East — _this will be our new normal unless we ACT._
That’s why, in partnership with my colleagues in the Congressional Progressive Caucus, we’re making it clear: **We can’t wait — the infrastructure package that Congress is working on right now is a golden opportunity to tackle this crisis with the urgency it demands.**
[**Will you join me in calling on House leadership to provide the bold investments in infrastructure that we need to defeat this climate crisis and ensure our frontline communities have the resources and investments they need to overcome it?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=3&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)
**[Sign the petition »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=4&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)**
Our infrastructure isn't remotely ready for the worst effects of climate change. Just look at what record temperatures did to roads in Seattle...
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=5&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)
and streetcar cables in Portland, Oregon...
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=6&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)
Voters across America delivered Democrats the House, Senate, and White House. They want us to go big, go bold, and go fast on the change we promised them — including action on climate. **Negotiating away necessary investments in infrastructure that make our communities more resilient from the impacts of climate change in pursuit of MAYBE getting a few Republican votes is irresponsible —**** _and we can’t back down_****.**
[**If you agree with me that now — not a few months or years from now — is the time to act boldly, add your name to our petition calling on House leadership to take action on climate change in our infrastructure package.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=7&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)
**[Sign the petition »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate_action_now/?source=em20210710&t=8&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210710-447-footer&t=9&refcode2=447_420207_-ZlDAc&akid=447%2E420207%2E-ZlDAc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Hillary’s right on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Peter, Hundreds of thousands of names have been purged from voter registration rolls across the country this year by GOP-lead state legislatures who want to make sure that our historic turnout for Joe Biden will never be repeated. |
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I continued to expose the critical race theory training that has infected our military, depleting morale and ruining the reputation of our military. I also called out woke teachers who want to indoctrinate our students to believe America is racist. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlkldCv1Wt79bcqSs_DUnjzbxxDhpQFQYSezdyXL3s_HvFZmSqcLTgcYap8cMWIHDV2ZYyZtXKVSgPc-ufYAou1AfEy1mCX9eEU_IaTwFYsplrh4zWtgB8Qg=&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1Ilpm9V5PAUE4S5_t6eiFsSbxoMSP-2Zn-fXfSz48CYiTZZXdpMd2tq-BiTp9UFYvwXT3rbp7ExsTLEGLrGET5i_rZ6Rp4iN9xWcM8gFktSjMw&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1Ilpm9V5PAUE4SqM1qDNpoV_RHiDURkyXf2vEK_ZbMGQxBuURuiACHkXSpNMXbmd1GtS8bD7g5uRARtyGhnJHZzfoboPl3xDIMmdsqJ9pl_ApssEb9e2Q8_iU=&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==).
Now, here's your brief.
---
| | |
---
| GET CRT OUT OF OUR MILITARY
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlkldCv1Wt79bJyuTKmhiyxZRpAL0wLTqNKaAho5K_sl_YBjAPzgwSQlyRReGz3SP_gbn6jemphbYFPeQnAgn-fzfHTvD1TWFrgtkTuFMILyhixMhW6DQw2kt5KhCC-ZZAzu0N0OqLv9TMYXFQIpS5hquAYhjmkf3NuDfi7yP-nmrkZwZ_qwvKegMZIfR4vhaAY18i1hZQzaFDmt2LE28PYlJG0AqtCvOPryC8cSzS19XBhjdZypkt2xGWdk7h5Y_9Q==&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlkldCv1Wt79bJyuTKmhiyxZRpAL0wLTqNKaAho5K_sl_YBjAPzgwSQlyRReGz3SP_gbn6jemphbYFPeQnAgn-fzfHTvD1TWFrgtkTuFMILyhixMhW6DQw2kt5KhCC-ZZAzu0N0OqLv9TMYXFQIpS5hquAYhjmkf3NuDfi7yP-nmrkZwZ_qwvKegMZIfR4vhaAY18i1hZQzaFDmt2LE28PYlJG0AqtCvOPryC8cSzS19XBhjdZypkt2xGWdk7h5Y_9Q==&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==)
We've received more than 400 credible complaints about critical race theory - the academic theory that says America is irredeemably racist to the core - seeping into our military. And it's worse than we thought.
One complaint was particularly disturbing - soldiers were forced to wear personal identification badges that listed their race, ethnicity, social class, and other things, during at training at Fort Bliss in Texas.
This is EXACTLY the sort of thing that has no place in our military. We are creating divisions in an environment that REQUIRES camaraderie amongst soldiers.
I won't stand for this. Our military should be training WARRIORS, not social justice warriors.
Help me fight back. [SIGN THE PETITION TO KEEP CRITICAL RACE THEORY OUT OF OUR MILITARY.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlvzfKGeQVp1AOyJwkrHBd335kq5Qy3DXHy22zlocDaihsoQvLxK7TsRviRW5ARoG9cb19UZf9IGd81OzGf43XFBiKjJTWtKAJlo3iZ7pmjFjSiUGz9AN6Nk2QccoVVITajA3EzIMGM96urfrmlgpBh9pTc5u2xTHFA4_uYMY6XmZwfvCw7NoQjguZO_MuXAIe8MBv_WPceNhxw22TxzIhrfaoNdWTBAnjNkq3xxfDPPYSUBrpnaAkQpMnKHCSHJ2O-Ut5fGpd0Uxk1cTzMTfw0E=&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| RALLY FOR MY FRIEND AND FELLOW PATRIOT JAKE ELLZEY
---
|
---
| If you live in Texas' 6th Congressional District - I want to see you this Wednesday, July 14 at 5:30pm at Legal Draft Beer Company, 500 E. Division St., Arlington, TX 76011.
I am hosting a huge rally for my friend Jake Ellzey. Jake is a retired Navy Commander and the former Air Boss of the U.S.S. Ronald Reagan.
I know Jake will defend your freedoms in Congress, and I could use another fighter by my side in Washington, D.C. to stop socialism from taking over our great country.
Early voting in the runoff election starts soon. If you can't make it to our rally - [please send your support to Jake by contributing any amount you can afford to his campaign.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlgW0MeJs9_Cxn8rB7o28aY5Gd62lQMcR644tUXzR_FPNPeQ-zQsmhGcVoKVQnY9t-ZoFvleH0Oms_y-znLpvGTwX515Ch6HUzKbH1nXuv3yISz4uwzb_MOzYuIg9EF7vkA2jX0sPZYxmfhiVOUYXbivMs_YhS793oA==&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==)

| GET THESE PEOPLE AWAY FROM OUR KIDS
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlkldCv1Wt79ba2w16xDGTPaAchHqrfKiXLzSD4XO2mKu-G9ZtoMObmwfhcju9ogT2Do9QsKMMPZaLZP61ugGleNQIU9Xkeq2uy3a2hshtrBjOY4J6DLherOZpz2os4yLAtXTxPJe_PvQEGm-HcVzI9xhC8o91fumzx0Z5HAMqidKo7NQEX1_BcbF6KuasYMl-FV7OkAAoTm6GRD4ZJNCAeyUUA6O8CUqsx7CnMErnMQz&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==)

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlkldCv1Wt79ba2w16xDGTPaAchHqrfKiXLzSD4XO2mKu-G9ZtoMObmwfhcju9ogT2Do9QsKMMPZaLZP61ugGleNQIU9Xkeq2uy3a2hshtrBjOY4J6DLherOZpz2os4yLAtXTxPJe_PvQEGm-HcVzI9xhC8o91fumzx0Z5HAMqidKo7NQEX1_BcbF6KuasYMl-FV7OkAAoTm6GRD4ZJNCAeyUUA6O8CUqsx7CnMErnMQz&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==)
Critical race theory isn't just destroying our military, it's destroying the education of America's children. Woke teachers and their unions have implemented critical race theory into their lesson plans, teaching America's children that the color of their skin dictates what kind of person they are and that their country is racist beyond repair.
The same people who locked our kids out of school - ignoring the science, doing immeasurable harm to America's most vulnerable students - now want to indoctrinate students to believe a far-left ideology based on Marxism.
The political right wants to teach our kids to LOVE America DESPITE her imperfections.
The political left wants to teach our kids to HATE America because of them. Get these people out of our schools and away from our kids.
[SIGN THE PETITION TO BAN CRITICAL RACE THEORY FROM AMERICA'S SCHOOLS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z_YeWB6YTYBVkNNBoBb1dnFl0uGXs_kg1Z3A-irFbfPr2iDhIB1IlkldCv1Wt79bl7xojUnynPKoup1qj6OF6VmcgMM0wyH_obQMNtElky3zm-7814VJAo1bdCnIz7M5Ma8JaHuR24uKi4STA4XSD9FRvSLDAMsl7hYXqxxutOukblhNN2HPrAX7mYeNxW3VzZZIaAtFo6Vw8jfAb5DMgR9gA2b1dzmqnCm869kLDI21SfoxP4eciyUOj8rScf1hyuh5X3RGiHsnZJRDsYMucv11zMFopdN7IwUrZg-Diwl1TfBvF9TMBuTQiu3hGwPhSt7RBy7T1ai2LlsVqhTrNw==&c=Ij4HytYJXhMtGq7K_ufwfPmWwEh_piWOibVKiXxc_vlq1cmS0r3a_w==&ch=j1cRDooNsQPRiz5gOwqQvR-ftVlRSjLOi58JQzQpICl_BZhE4AdMdg==)

| PARTY LIKE IT'S 1776

| Remember that epic Fourth of July party I promised? Well, we DELIVERED!
Thousands of people came to Houston to celebrate our Independence Day last weekend. It was great to see so many patriotic Americans celebrate our founding and our freedom.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I continued to expose the critical race theory training that has infected our military, depleting morale and ruining the reputation of our military. I also called out woke teachers who want to indoctrinate our students to believe America is racist. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | GET CRT OUT OF OUR MILITARY | == | == We've received more than 400 credible complaints about critical race theory - the academic theory that says America is irredeemably racist to the core - seeping into our military. And it's worse than we thought. One complaint was particularly disturbing - soldiers were forced to wear personal identification badges that listed their race, ethnicity, social class, and other things, during at training at Fort Bliss in Texas. This is EXACTLY the sort of thing that has no place in our military. We are creating divisions in an environment that REQUIRES camaraderie amongst soldiers. I won't stand for this. Our military should be training WARRIORS, not social justice warriors. Help me fight back. == | | | | | | RALLY FOR MY FRIEND AND FELLOW PATRIOT JAKE ELLZEY | | If you live in Texas' 6th Congressional District - I want to see you this Wednesday, July 14 at 5:30pm at Legal Draft Beer Company, 500 E. Division St., Arlington, TX 76011. I am hosting a huge rally for my friend Jake Ellzey. Jake is a retired Navy Commander and the former Air Boss of the U.S.S. Ronald Reagan. I know Jake will defend your freedoms in Congress, and I could use another fighter by my side in Washington, D.C. to stop socialism from taking over our great country. Early voting in the runoff election starts soon. If you can't make it to our rally - == | | | | GET THESE PEOPLE AWAY FROM OUR KIDS | == | == Critical race theory isn't just destroying our military, it's destroying the education of America's children. Woke teachers and their unions have implemented critical race theory into their lesson plans, teaching America's children that the color of their skin dictates what kind of person they are and that their country is racist beyond repair. The same people who locked our kids out of school - ignoring the science, doing immeasurable harm to America's most vulnerable students - now want to indoctrinate students to believe a far-left ideology based on Marxism. The political right wants to teach our kids to LOVE America DESPITE her imperfections. The political left wants to teach our kids to HATE America because of them. Get these people out of our schools and away from our kids. == | | | | PARTY LIKE IT'S 1776 | == | Remember that epic Fourth of July party I promised? Well, we DELIVERED! Thousands of people came to Houston to celebrate our Independence Day last weekend. It was great to see so many patriotic Americans celebrate our founding and our freedom. I put together a quick recap video of party. Click on the image above to watch on YouTube or check it out on ==, ==, and ==. If you were at the party, post your pictures using the #summerof1776. We will see you next year! | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS NEW YORK POST: == DAILY WIRE: == DAILY CALLER: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | By providing your phone number, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (ckq.io/49500) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Team Crenshaw to the phone number you provide.
