name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Glenn Youngkin’s opposition to health care is sad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
we have to protect our health care
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32196629/295010130/-2023814932?refcode=20210710.3_TM_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZkOTgwZS1jNmUxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWfWsJ85csq0q7DNK0QDjbDz99KpKnFb9pFZzrgL6IU=)

| | Derek, this past year, we saw just how important Medicaid expansion was to hard-working Virginians and to folks across the country. Before COVID-19 hit, 394,000 Virginians were enrolled in Medicaid. Now? It’s over 550,000. That’s over 150,000 Virginians who had coverage during the worst global public health crisis in recent history because of Medicaid expansion. **But our work is not over.** 700,000 Virginians - including 100,000 children - don't have access to health insurance. We NEED to continue to expand coverage to make sure every single Virginian has great health care. [**I want to know -- what are your health care priorities, and do you agree that we need to continue to expand coverage?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32196630/295010131/-1207286894?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZkOTgwZS1jNmUxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWfWsJ85csq0q7DNK0QDjbDz99KpKnFb9pFZzrgL6IU=&emci=a801b300-ebe0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=406d980e-c6e1-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477) | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32196631/295010132/-1207286894?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZkOTgwZS1jNmUxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWfWsJ85csq0q7DNK0QDjbDz99KpKnFb9pFZzrgL6IU=&emci=a801b300-ebe0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=406d980e-c6e1-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)
---
My Trump-endorsed opponent Glenn Youngkin hates the idea of getting people access to quality, affordable care. He opposes Medicaid expansion and actually said passing the Affordable Care Act made him “sad.”
Glenn Youngkin wouldn't have expanded Medicaid. He supports legislation that would undermine the Affordable Care Act. He has NO health care plan, and we can't count on him to do anything to address rising costs or expand access in office.
I believe Youngkin’s radical views on health care are wrong for Virginia and I need to know: do you agree? What are your health care priorities?
[TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32196632/295010133/-1207286894?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZkOTgwZS1jNmUxLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWfWsJ85csq0q7DNK0QDjbDz99KpKnFb9pFZzrgL6IU=&emci=a801b300-ebe0-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=406d980e-c6e1-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)

I’m looking forward to reading your responses.
\-- Terry

| **Weekly Newsletter ******

_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**For those who missed it, last night the NHGOP and __Grafton County__ __ collaborated in a dinner to host Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and it was a sold out success! Thank you to all who purchased tickets to attend the event, especially to John Motta and Dan Richards, who donated an entire table EACH to provide free tickets to local veterans. Support towards these events provide our party with the means to operate and ensure resources to Republican candidates throughout the state. Unlike NH Democrats who primarily receive large, out-of-state donations, the New Hampshire Republican Party relies on our fundraisers and small in-state donor donations. Every little bit helps, and it’s truly up to every one of us to try and do our part.

As Governor Sununu said last night, we need to do everything we can to promote our solid Republican budget. This means submitting LTEs, posting to social media, and telling your friends and family about the transformational state budget Republicans just passed. We at the NHGOP are here to help! Make sure you follow us on Twitter and Facebook for our latest insights, and feel free to reach out to Joe or Maya for help in crafting your own LTEs about the budget. Together we’ll fight back against the millions in out-of-state special interest dollars seeking to spread mistruths about the Republican budget.

Additionally, I have my own Twitter account now that we’ll use to share information about the New Hampshire Republican Party - please “join” me on Twitter by following me at @NHGOPChairman!

That being said, we have a TON of fun opportunities for folks to get active in the coming weeks, so be sure to keep checking our **[**NHGOP calendar**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fcalendar%2F/1/0100017a918728c9-01092934-68f4-4e55-b6f0-9f1e1cd9b89c-000000/7YJp_W0f45RY0syGf0RnhhXGeR0=226)**, because tickets are selling out FAST. Our most recent dinner with Dan Crenshaw sold out almost a week before the event date, so don't wait! **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **
---

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

Thank you to all who purchased tickets to attend the event, especially to John Motta and Dan Richards, who donated an entire table EACH to provide free tickets to local veterans. Support towards these events provide our party with the means to operate and ensure resources to Republican candidates throughout the state. Unlike NH Democrats who primarily receive large, out-of-state donations, the New Hampshire Republican Party relies on our fundraisers and small in-state donor donations. Every little bit helps, and it’s truly up to every one of us to try and do our part. As Governor Sununu said last night, we need to do everything we can to promote our solid Republican budget. This means submitting LTEs, posting to social media, and telling your friends and family about the transformational state budget Republicans just passed. We at the NHGOP are here to help! Make sure you follow us on Twitter and Facebook for our latest insights, and feel free to reach out to Joe or Maya for help in crafting your own LTEs about the budget. Together we’ll fight back against the millions in out-of-state special interest dollars seeking to spread mistruths about the Republican budget. Additionally, I have my own Twitter account now that we’ll use to share information about the New Hampshire Republican Party - please “join” me on Twitter by following me at @NHGOPChairman! That being said, we have a TON of fun opportunities for folks to get active in the coming weeks, so be sure to keep checking our , because tickets are selling out FAST. body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

---
Peter,
---
I have officially initiated the process for a forensic investigation of the Pennsylvania 2020 election.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57912484:6ppVqJlNH:m:1:3253819041:5C6AEEFF4C6DDB517DF3431344533D0E:r)
---
[Source: Associated Press]
---
_I have already requested information from counties across Pennsylvania with a deadline to comply by July 31._
---
_As a citizen of the freest nation in the world, YOU have a RIGHT to know that our elections are honest and fair -- and I promise to fight to uncover the truth about the 2020 election for you._
---

** Kelly Tshibaka endorsed by Alaska Republican Party **
---
Alaska conservative Republican U.S. Senate candidate Kelly Tshibaka today released the following statement regarding the endorsement of her candidacy by the Alaska Republican Party: “I am grateful and thrilled to have the strong support of the Alaska Republican Party, which voted overwhelmingly to endorse my candidacy for the U.S. Senate. We all share a unified goal: to promote the principles upon which our country and state were founded. I have pledged that I will be true to our shared, conservative Alaska ideals and be a senator upon whom they can depend to make every decision based on what is best for our great state. “We now move forward with a united front, determined to defend Alaska from the continued onslaught of the radical Biden administration. We need a senator who will stand with Alaskans and not cozy up to the Washington, D.C. insiders, a senator who has earned the trust of the people and strives to keep it every day. It is time for conservative leaders, with courage and common sense, to rise together across the nation. I am honored to be endorsed as that candidate for Alaska.”
###

[](www.kellyforak.com)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Critical race theory spits in the face of civil rights!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910501:JsyS4JlsN:m:1:3253819041:EC6F1867FEEF1D78663892A283AADF85:r) | |
---
Peter,

Critical race theory is divisive down to its very core.

It's a movement that seeks to indoctrinate our children, rewrite history, and spit in the face of civil rights.

There's no place for it in our classrooms, our military, or our government - and I'm not going to stop saying that anytime soon.
[**I AGREE: STAND WITH RAND >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910501:JsyS4JlsN:m:1:3253819041:EC6F1867FEEF1D78663892A283AADF85:r)
The Biden-Harris administration has embraced this out-of-touch philosophy because they've been completely overrun by the radicals within their party.

You thought the Green New Deal was bad? Or maybe that 1 year+ of lockdowns would be the worst of it?

The truth is - that was only the beginning.

_The radical left wants to divide every American, replace every institution, and rebuild our nation to resemble the "socialist utopia" hellscape they've always wanted._

Putting an end to Critical Race Theory is just one step in stopping their destructive plans.

As a Senator, I have the chance to stand up to the bureaucrats implementing critical race theory, but I need your help to show our strength against this radicalism. Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?

You can use this secure link: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2563203/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910501:JsyS4JlsN:m:1:3253819041:EC6F1867FEEF1D78663892A283AADF85:r)**

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: BREAKING: Video service refuses to host our videos!
body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbde45fc98de4b12a7f3a267444a2340&_e=zbXFes4t_i4ZdMzhYizoVOkXfuUnCaVDGx7MzHEn2pJDOpt8_mhuQGzr19YcbvhnmHRC5yzxbyubF4KjxmkaJEy1vbOpND6mUAX6OO6l-Rj6PhWJTerrlL2TannQhi4h0hplf1FR7su7LKhEdsx_U8RdkfQn20byIO8I7I6yLirftdMYGCfoya34dvvafU-U72NLFu9Xbv0Bp-81X1wocbvbu_G4jg_xGA2O1bfBcsnBKWbuH0wOPueup79-31c1J-iluVbM6iHYA8VrNotmfb3CmXpiqr0hhjXAH3qbYxzVJS4wy6RiKPBIX_RVWVmGSChoZls5RDVLRArDSzVYBw%3D%3D) [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbde45fc98de4b12a7f3a267444a2340&_e=zbXFes4t_i4ZdMzhYizoVOkXfuUnCaVDGx7MzHEn2pJDOpt8_mhuQGzr19YcbvhnmHRC5yzxbyubF4KjxmkaJEy1vbOpND6mUAX6OO6l-Rj6PhWJTerrlL2TannQhi4hmzpkT8ck7wqLE5ayh5IFa8ZICApuIEQ93Fk4On_x8YEij0eLaOpv6hc9g3QwksV9ijqVtlTRoXBuGmM_-LV3uTmKk1pMo7wVJiPkFfHYvPH0Qu9am0dWF1FsHgnMogkIcjh3cx105U6TJXzoQXDxyyDLwhCF_zq-6n7c_jpBRKCq5ZybsEuAUAnD7nCN2X6XCwTU6SOokF5Po0hJifmzUA%3D%3D) Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled! **Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure.** Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player. Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat. Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.” PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words: “...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...” **[Give Today to Help PragerU Gain Independence from Big Tech!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbde45fc98de4b12a7f3a267444a2340&_e=zbXFes4t_i4ZdMzhYizoVOkXfuUnCaVDGx7MzHEn2pJDOpt8_mhuQGzr19YcbvhnmHRC5yzxbyubF4KjxmkaJEy1vbOpND6mUAX6OO6l-Rj6PhWJTerrlL2TannQhi4h4Mzb7TWwmp8tckL5-NuhQRBRvTqg3eP7o63iiQr0FZwR8A4B6aoFkPaBz7FXJUlkmPFo9u7uBZVtmLEE_p6dt4ij6HQGdPKbbPeIRXeQBtEjv3Igq1zTxyNi2_YCuQSJTITC5pm8Ae_Yj8YzZ9vWQ_glxtocZwNq-STd9kQyF2gavQDUFUo41us5cWpffIUk0Aj6ia4kcFdk9TJlaJuHcw%3D%3D)** In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client. Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America. [**Now, even PragerU’s own platforms are under attack.** We call on you again, our wonderful supporters, to stand by us! ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbde45fc98de4b12a7f3a267444a2340&_e=zbXFes4t_i4ZdMzhYizoVOkXfuUnCaVDGx7MzHEn2pJDOpt8_mhuQGzr19YcbvhnmHRC5yzxbyubF4KjxmkaJEy1vbOpND6mUAX6OO6l-Rj6PhWJTerrlL2TannQhi4h-MR49aYCZ7qMkgA7EJPKCAawR6QMbCdMIHPpxxTluhSHlNyG1ZPFr2iIEuzQ4Uw7xJK6fkrSADKtxrGIdroskbS58dUEJoDmqq5t5EAbA2S0rR9rbZvExf_Z7HynbxYuJ1JUp-NeCKko7yvVyn1M07ba8Hjsg-sTz5cpooOBTlPy7FDWx19LDl3LV2qpEQLAzP2Q11MSoZ0gxW5pa8Btbg%3D%3D) What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. [Donate Now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbde45fc98de4b12a7f3a267444a2340&_e=zbXFes4t_i4ZdMzhYizoVOkXfuUnCaVDGx7MzHEn2pJDOpt8_mhuQGzr19YcbvhnmHRC5yzxbyubF4KjxmkaJEy1vbOpND6mUAX6OO6l-Rj6PhWJTerrlL2TannQhi4hD-Xe5cpmDniuZj2HCrz-SmwNAM6YYC1M47tLxM3GcYkfmcPuT_EHkAZEtZmn3-CJTBxkftyn1LQOUbetaqhnCAW3oKyrqfdGwwiTV08-IIUjvLGq70P3HyuVYf1VefTuWSHrw8aFozY2izoP2LmnkthF47PfRfS-COQd6gtsafGvMhZwG4JU-zCLj6Lp0FVyXmW5FYGnJzcHfJGiNTyzdA%3D%3D) **Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies—for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny.** **[Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds! ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbde45fc98de4b12a7f3a267444a2340&_e=zbXFes4t_i4ZdMzhYizoVOkXfuUnCaVDGx7MzHEn2pJDOpt8_mhuQGzr19YcbvhnmHRC5yzxbyubF4KjxmkaJEy1vbOpND6mUAX6OO6l-Rj6PhWJTerrlL2TannQhi4hL_1rev395qJiXrkBSVUiE2I-Vkcu9_n-XcX-0AzzPTDypI0kSZteT2hP2TiGj_k_dk19pcDXqDl3BTIFL_f5I0zwx-a1E0L_5ObL_uq-53cqKhQyqAp-3atnqQ1H8MERIsSqGZkc69rE4KIPrTYfv7XXKSLPTEALYMgO1e4VmC-zOFbe7VBdsT7j1fhDVWgfwllKKYSYp40EQeUmB-vEVA%3D%3D)** We cannot do this alone, Your PragerU Team | |

subject: Cox & Newsom Square Off On Homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
Cox continued his bus tour this week, making stops in Fresno, Bakersfield, and San Diego, and sharing his plan to address homelessness in California. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/8jt85jsn9d-4948610?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=4344088217&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=42776709b4&e=b8a6795190)
---
# The Beauty & The Beast Square Off On Homelessness
John Cox continued his statewide bus tour this week with stops in **Fresno, Bakersfield, and San Diego** to share his plan to address homelessness in California.Newsom was also in the Central Valley, [making a sad attempt to defend his record on homelessness](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=87d1b9da6b&e=b8a6795190), pointing out that the biggest investment on homelessness was made last year - $1 billion. But looking around at the growing number of tents and trash on our streets, does anyone honestly believe things are getting better? **It only proves the point that throwing money at the problem doesn’t work.** In fact, as Newsom’s funding has increased, so has homelessness. **As a CPA, outsider, and successful businessman, John knows how to bring new ideas and change that will actually solve problems.** As outlined in his [**24-page policy plan**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=86a3ddbdc9&e=b8a6795190) , John is proposing a four-point plan to solve homelessness.
1. Treatment First - Before Housing
2. Utilize and Increase Enforcement Actions
3. Focused Funding - Steer Money to Solutions
4. Lower the Cost of Additional Housing & Increase Speed to Market of New Units

| [Read John’s Homelessness Policy Plan](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=625542e494&e=b8a6795190)
---
### Tour to End Homelessness
For week 2 of John’s statewide bus tour, he visited the Central Valley and his home city, San Diego. John talked with local media about getting the homeless treatment and making housing more affordable, things Gavin Newsom has promised to do but failed to deliver.** To illustrate the problem felt by Californians everyday as they walk through their communities and see the mess caused by homelessness, John continued to campaign with an 8-foot trashball. **
### Fresno
**“The campaign trail for the hotly contested recall election of California governor, Gavin Newsom is picking up speed,”** [Fresno’s KSEE ](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=77321c6677&e=b8a6795190)reported earlier this week. John continued his second week of his statewide tour in downtown Fresno on Wednesday. While Newsom has announced plans to spend billions more on ineffective homelessness strategies that have been tried before, including spending $65,000 on tents, John emphasized taking the opposite approach: **a treatment-first plan to combat homelessness.**
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=aacd9a3902&e=b8a6795190)
### Bakersfield
Thursday’s 100 degree heat at **Weill Park** in Fresno served as a reminder of the 160,000+ Californians living without protection and cooling during the hot summer months. **In the Central Valley, homelessness has become a crisis.** The old way of doing things hasn’t worked. As billions of dollars have been spent, homelessness has increased throughout the state. It’s neither compassionate nor effective to leave these people on the streets. It’s time to do things differently.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=22bd142cf1&e=b8a6795190)
### San Diego
At **Shelter Island** in San Diego, John spoke about how Gavin Newsom has failed Californians. When asked about his mismanagement of the homelessness crisis, Gavin Newsom argues that he’s only been in office for 29 months, but most will agree that those 29 months speak volumes.
Solving homelessness in California requires new, bold ideas. **It requires a new way of thinking and shaking up the status quo.** That’s what John’s plan does and why we’ll cut homelessness in half in California.
### Watch John’s Newest Digital Ad
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=cee4453379&e=b8a6795190)
| [Follow the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=ff22ba05f8&e=b8a6795190)
---
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e8613da5d7&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e1a8f752a9&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=87da7daff7&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=67a325d473&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=10f8b52677&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
### [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=794c848f16&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc. FPPC ID #14377013525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
[Add us to your address book](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256) [Update Preferences](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=eb8ffd0f9c) | [Unsubscribe](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=eb8ffd0f9c)

Peter,

Early voting has started for OH-15 Special Election and it’s no coincidence the Leftist media took the opportunity to unleash a barrage of negative attacks and blatant lies against me.

Their objectives are clear:
1. Tear down the only Trump-endorsed candidate in this race.

name: VOTING RIGHTS ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: 16 More responses needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT our Democrats in the fight to protect voting rights? | | | | **_CRITICAL VOTING RIGHTS SURVEY:_**

In our July Priorities Survey, Democrats told us protecting voting rights was their TOP priority.

But Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to suppress the vote.**

So we need to know: Do you SUPPORT our Democrats in the fight to protect voting rights?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3R0kyc-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

In our July Priorities Survey, thousands of grassroots Democrats just like you told us protecting voting rights was their TOP priority.

And here at Democratic HQ, we couldn't agree more.

That's why we're so proud to have a president who is committed to fighting for voting rights every step of the way:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe9Aa~)

**But we won 't sugarcoat it: Republicans are _dead set_ on obstructing President Biden and opposing our Democrats' efforts to protect voting rights.**

It's an uphill battle, but our Democrats will never give up the fight.

[**So we need to know: Do you SUPPORT our Democrats in the fight to protect voting rights?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3R0kyc-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3R0kyc-)
---|---|---

Thanks,

Democratic HQ
---

---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45281948&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MjYzMzc2OQS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45281948&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0MjYzMzc2OQS2&l=10390000&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910687:63wMOJlNz:m:1:3253819041:985C2E2613C56227583448D0275EABC9:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910687:63wMOJlNz:m:1:3253819041:985C2E2613C56227583448D0275EABC9:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910687:63wMOJlNz:m:1:3253819041:985C2E2613C56227583448D0275EABC9:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910687:63wMOJlNz:m:1:3253819041:985C2E2613C56227583448D0275EABC9:r) And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910687:63wMOJlNz:m:1:3253819041:985C2E2613C56227583448D0275EABC9:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910687:63wMOJlNz:m:1:3253819041:985C2E2613C56227583448D0275EABC9:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910687:63wMOJlNz:m:1:3253819041:985C2E2613C56227583448D0275EABC9:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big Tech lawsuit FILED - Free speech on the line Peter
body:
Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. For almost an entire year, big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook, and Google have silenced and censored millions of conservative Americans for speaking freely or questioning the government-approved "opinions" on the coronavirus or the 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough, we've now uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with these Big Tech corporations to de-platform and silence conservatives for raising legitimate concerns over the integrity of the 2020 election. ** ** **In other words, we 've caught big government unconstitutionally colluding with big tech to silence their political opponents...** And unless folks like you and me take immediate action to stop this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. [**That is why I am urgently asking you and every other American patriot reading this letter to contribute $35 or more to help us sue Twitter and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) Let me explain... In 2018, the state government of California created the Office of Elections Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on election laws and procedures. And as any sensible person could predict, this office quickly devolved into a political weapon for censorship by the far-left Secretary of State's Office. The reason I mention this is because this past February, conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley logged onto Twitter when he found that he had been banned from Twitter for violating the governments "rules about election integrity". [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) You see, from November 2020 to February 2021, Rogan tweeted a series of messages expressing his concerns over the dubious presidential election procedures and skepticism over the results. And every time he made a statement that was deemed a "violation", it was promptly removed from Twitter. But that is not the worst of it... Recently, documents were found showing that leftist operatives within the Election Cybersecurity office flagged Rogan's tweets as "misinformation" and coded it as an "orange" level threat indicating problematic speech. _**Then it happened ...**_ After Rogan dared to question the legitimacy of the number of votes Joe Biden received during the election, Twitter permanently suspended Rogan altogether. Hopefully I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs and opinions is a gross violation of our freedom of speech. But Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and followed by more than four hundred thousand people. So, it was clear that the only reason his account was suspended was because left was worried that Rogan's tweets could damage Joe Biden's image. In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden. The liberal elites responsible for de-platforming Rogan were also worries that his tweets would destroy the image of then-California Secretary of State Alex Padilla - _who at the time was being considered to fill Kamala Harris ' vacated Senate seat. _ It's doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between big government and big tech to silence political opponents is corrupt and wildly unconstitutional. **And that 's why me and my team of superb constitutional lawyers are suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault on the First Amendment. ** ** ** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I founded the Center for American Liberty to defend our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties from the corporations, politicians, socialist revolutionaries, and inept or bias government officials who try to infringe them. But I'll be honest with you, I never thought the assault on our individual rights would become this bad. Not only are we suing Twitter - a multi-billion-dollar corporation - for their gross infringement on Rogan's First Amendment right to free speech... We are simultaneously taking on the former-Secretary of State of California Alex Padilla for blatantly colluding with Twitter to silence conservative Americans for sharing their political opinions. **And even though we intend to win, this will be the hardest legal battle we 've ever fought.** You see, as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the help of like-minded conservative patriots like yourself. _ _ _And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000._ _ _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a one-time contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, corporations, and government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still the master of our own lives? [**I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing any amount to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures lambasted President Trump for the completely bogus allegations that he colluded with a foreign power to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech billionaires to influence the 2020 election, those same leftists are completely silent. I don't know about you, but I am fed up with the left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and flagrant unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910704:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57910705:6QtpRJlXN:m:1:3253819041:8A7C1E3ACF4E502C7A13D9869DEBEF72:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Joe Sweeney
subject: One week until our Night at the Winery with Tommy Hicks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Join us one week from today, as we welcome RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks to New Hampshire
Derek,

We are only one week away from our Night at the Winery with RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks. Join us on Saturday, July 17th as we welcome Tommy back to the Granite State.

[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnight-at-the-winery-with-rnc-co-chair-tommy-hicks%2F/1/0100017a92848a7f-9b3ebd70-6752-4deb-ae47-d628a4e06d7c-000000/zmTGOpCRZLsyuhf88I_gxx93P-I=226)

We are very pleased to welcome Tommy back to New Hampshire. He has been a strong proponent of conservative values in his role as Co-Chair of the RNC.

We're hard at work at the NHGOP to make sure we can elect even more Republicans in 2022, and this event will help support our efforts to support our candidates via mail and digital campaigns.

LaBelle is one of the most picturesque venues in the State, and we hope to see you there!

\- Joe

[Reserve Your Tickets Today!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnight-at-the-winery-with-rnc-co-chair-tommy-hicks%2F/2/0100017a92848a7f-9b3ebd70-6752-4deb-ae47-d628a4e06d7c-000000/8FFY4wpJrJI1A3GeHd2EO_ErvoI=226)

subject: Response Needed: Champion a Green New Deal for Virginia 🌻🌎
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats
body:
| | | | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=c8a613f324&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | | Team-

As we are campaigning for our candidates here in Virginia, it is vital to champion the issues that we care most about. The Virginia Justice Democrats have joined the coalition once again to champion an authentically Virginian Green New Deal in the 2022 Legislative Session. As the Democratic candidates campaign for the state legislature, we are calling on you to send an email to your current elected officials to let them know what we wish to see to battle climate change in the coming legislative session:
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=4972ed568f&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
| When the Cuyahoga River caught fire 52 years ago, it spurred the modern environmental movement and led to the creation of the EPA. Last week, the Gulf was on fire, hundreds died in the Pacific Northwest heatwave, and right now, cities are being consumed by flames. There has been a lot of talk about Green New Deal. It is not an environmental plan. It is an intersectional plan with the intentionality of lifting up people. We can address both the climate crisis and the inequality crisis with the same set of policies. As the impacts of climate change mount, inequality will continue to grow. We have to shift away from extracting and burning fossil fuels and towards a lower carbon economy. [Although 2022’s language is still being finalized, we need your help NOW to cultivate support by talking to your legislators about Green New Deal Virginia Coalition's legislative priorities.](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e5a0bc9654&e=76fc145c69)
---
| **Send a letter to your state representatives asking them to support Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation in 2022. You can use our sample letter, or personalize it by copying and pasting individual talking points provided below.**
1. After sending your letter, consider scheduling a meeting with your state representatives and let our Outreach and Education and Defossilization Energy Efficiency Renewables Working Group leaders know. We are here to help. Natalie Pien at natcpien1@gmail.com and Stacy Lovelace at johnsonsc3@gmail.com. Don’t know who your representatives are, find out here, [https://whosmy.virginiageneralassembly.gov](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=f2fb43ce3f&e=76fc145c69)!
2. Once your meeting is scheduled, invite your friends, your organization’s members, and/or DEER’s Working Group leader, Stacy, so she can see if any member from DEER can join you!
3. Prepare for your meeting with the talking points below and don’t forget to share your personal story about why Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation matters to you!

In Solidarity,
Virginia Justice Democrats
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=23784028ab&e=76fc145c69 "DONATE NOW")
---
| _Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. clean_body: | | | | | | | Team- As we are campaigning for our candidates here in Virginia, it is vital to champion the issues that we care most about. The Virginia Justice Democrats have joined the coalition once again to champion an authentically Virginian Green New Deal in the 2022 Legislative Session. As the Democratic candidates campaign for the state legislature, we are calling on you to send an email to your current elected officials to let them know what we wish to see to battle climate change in the coming legislative session: | | | When the Cuyahoga River caught fire 52 years ago, it spurred the modern environmental movement and led to the creation of the EPA. Last week, the Gulf was on fire, hundreds died in the Pacific Northwest heatwave, and right now, cities are being consumed by flames. There has been a lot of talk about Green New Deal. It is not an environmental plan. It is an intersectional plan with the intentionality of lifting up people. We can address both the climate crisis and the inequality crisis with the same set of policies. As the impacts of climate change mount, inequality will continue to grow. We have to shift away from extracting and burning fossil fuels and towards a lower carbon economy. | Send a letter to your state representatives asking them to support Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation in 2022. You can use our sample letter, or personalize it by copying and pasting individual talking points provided below. 1. After sending your letter, consider scheduling a meeting with your state representatives and let our Outreach and Education and Defossilization Energy Efficiency Renewables Working Group leaders know. We are here to help. Natalie Pien at natcpien1@gmail.com and Stacy Lovelace at johnsonsc3@gmail.com. Don’t know who your representatives are, find out here, ! 2. Once your meeting is scheduled, invite your friends, your organization’s members, and/or DEER’s Working Group leader, Stacy, so she can see if any member from DEER can join you! 3. Prepare for your meeting with the talking points below and don’t forget to share your personal story about why Green New Deal Virginia Coalition legislation matters to you! In Solidarity, Virginia Justice Democrats | "DONATE NOW" | Virginia Justice Democrats is independent from the national Justice Democrats. Our focus is on Virginia issues. Although we are in communication we do not take directions or instructions from the national organization. VAJD sets our own state-specific platforms, organizational structure, mission, and candidate vetting process. | Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats.
